hero.purpose: Screen-level headline, e.g. a goal's headline progress.

micro.purpose: Smallest UI text — tab labels, tiny badges.

shadows.name: xs
shadows.purpose: Hairline lift — flat cards, small buttons.

shadows.name: sm
shadows.purpose: Default small-surface lift — stat cards, header buttons.

shadows.name: lg
shadows.purpose: Prominent floating elements — the tab bar shell.

shadows.name: primary
shadows.purpose: Green-tinted glow for primary gradient CTAs and the center FAB.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Full-pill gradient CTA with a green glow shadow. Default action button.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 52px; padding: 0 22px; border: none; border-radius: 999px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7BD957, #66CC44); color: #FFFFFF; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; letter-spacing: 0.2px; box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(62,110,66,0.28); transition: transform 0.16s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), opacity 0.16s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3E6E42; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Soft green-tint fill, lower emphasis than Primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 52px; padding: 0 22px; border: none; border-radius: 999px; background: #EAF8E5; color: #3E6E42; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(27,42,27,0.04); transition: transform 0.16s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #DCF3D3; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3E6E42; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Elevated Card
components.description: Default surface card — white fill with soft diffuse shadow.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 20px; padding: 20px; box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(27,42,27,0.07); font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1E1E1E; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-card-money { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.3px; color: #1E1E1E; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Rounded field with animated green focus border and glow.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-input-label { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; color: #6E6E73; margin-left: 4px; } .ds-input { height: 56px; padding: 0 16px; border-radius: 20px; border: 1.5px solid #ECECEC; background: #FFFFFF; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 16px; color: #1E1E1E; transition: border-color 0.18s, box-shadow 0.18s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9A9AA0; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #66CC44; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(102,204,68,0.18); }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Pill status/category tag, tinted background with matching darker text.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 5px 11px; border-radius: 999px; background: #EAF8E5; color: #3E6E42; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.1px; }

components.name: Floating Tab Bar
components.description: Frosted-glass floating pill nav with an active tint pill and a raised gradient center action.
components.html:
Home
Insights
+
Goals
Split
components.css: .ds-tabbar { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-around; height: 64px; padding: 0 6px; border-radius: 28px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.72); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.6); box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(27,42,27,0.10); font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-tab { font-size: 10.5px; font-weight: 600; color: #9A9AA0; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 999px; } .ds-tab-active { background: #EAF8E5; color: #3E6E42; } .ds-fab { width: 58px; height: 58px; border-radius: 29px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7BD957, #66CC44); color: #FFFFFF; font-weight: 700; font-size: 20px; box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(62,110,66,0.28); margin-bottom: 22px; }

narrative.overview:
Fingekko reads like a premium, trustworthy financial record that quietly rewards you for keeping it — never a rewards app that happens to track money. Every surface is soft, rounded, and generously spaced, so that expense tracking, group settlements, and streaks all sit inside the same unhurried system. The single Fresh Growth Green accent carries meaning wherever it appears — progress, brand, completion — while the rest of the interface stays a calm off-white and near-black neutral scale. Depth comes from soft, diffuse shadows and a single deliberate frosted-glass moment (the floating tab bar), not from gradients, glows, or decorative texture.

This system explicitly rejects the cartoon-mascot, confetti-first energy of gamified rewards apps (no badges-as-decoration, no loud celebratory chrome competing with the numbers) and the dense, gray, spreadsheet feel of legacy finance tools (no cramped tables, no utilitarian gray-on-gray). Encouragement is expressed through restrained motion and typography weight, not through noise.
keyCharacteristics: One brand color (Fresh Growth Green), used deliberately rather than everywhere
Soft, rounded surfaces at every scale — cards, buttons, inputs, the tab bar itself
Money-first typography: numeric values get their own weighted, tightly-tracked type roles (money, moneyLg)
Layered elevation via soft, colored-dark shadows rather than hard black drop shadows

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Fresh Growth Green is the only saturated brand color in the system. Status colors (success/warning/danger/info) exist strictly for semantic meaning — income vs. expense, on-track vs. overdue — never as decorative alternatives to brand green.

rules.name: The Tint-Not-Wash Rule
rules.body: Green Tint (#EAF8E5) is a background wash for small, deliberate surfaces (a secondary button, an active tab pill, a tinted card) — never a full-screen background. Full screens stay on BG or Surface.

rules.name: The Money-First Rule
rules.body: Any numeric currency value gets a dedicated money or moneyLg role, never body or h1 repurposed — the tighter tracking and heavier weight is what makes a number read as money rather than as generic text.

rules.name: The Soft-Floating Rule
rules.body: Every shadow is wide-radius and low-opacity. A tight, dark, hard-edged shadow reads as a 2014-era Material app; if a shadow looks like it was cut out with scissors, the radius is too small and the opacity too high.

rules.name: The One Glass Rule
rules.body: Frosted blur is reserved for the floating tab bar alone. No other card, header, or modal uses expo-blur or a translucent glass treatment — glassmorphism as a general decoration is explicitly rejected.

dos: Do keep Fresh Growth Green (#66CC44) as the only saturated brand color; status colors exist for semantic meaning only.
Do use full pill radius (999px) on every button and the tab bar, 20–24px on cards — soft and rounded, never sharp.
Do give every currency figure the money or moneyLg type role, not a repurposed heading style.
Do keep shadows wide-radius and low-opacity, colored with the dark-green-black #1B2A1B rather than pure black.
Do pair every status color with an icon or label, never rely on color alone.
Do animate focus and press states gently (180–300ms, ease-out) — feedback should feel calm, not snappy or bouncy.
donts: Don't introduce a second saturated brand hue — no purple, gold, or neon accent competing with the green.
Don't add cartoon mascots, confetti bursts, or badge-as-decoration gamification chrome.
Don't build dense, gray, spreadsheet-style tables.
Don't use border-left/border-right colored stripes as a card accent anywhere.
Don't use frosted glass/blur outside the floating tab bar.
Don't use hard, tight, dark drop shadows (small radius + high opacity).
Don't let placeholder or tertiary text drop below AA contrast against Surface/BG.
